title: GTBeesMatrix
description: This mod is an add-on for GTCEu and Forestry that fixes bee breeding and compatibility issues while enabling item creation with GT machines.
body:
# GTBeesMatrix
- GTBeesMatrix is an add-on for GTCEu and Forestry that fixes bee breeding and compatibility issues while enabling item creation with GT machines.
- By installing the supported mods listed below, you can receive various integrations. All recipes are reworked to use the GregTech material system and progression.
- This mod can be used as part of a ModPack or standalone.

## TODO
- Industrial Apiary inspired by GTNH is currently in development. -> Supported in v1.3.0
- Mega Apiary inspired by GTNH is currently in development. -> Supported in v1.4.0

## Features

### Forestry Integration
- Resolves minor issues in the Forestry Module:
  - Some bees cannot be bred due to requested blocks being uncraftable
  - Some bees cannot be bred due to a misconfiguration in the OreDictionary
  - The Large Autoclave (GCYM) does not support Distinct Buses when Forestry is installed
- All materials are converted to GT
- Forestry Multifarm support for GregTech Rubber Saplings
- GT Fertilizer works as Multifarm fertilizer
- Farm blocks get proper GregTech Assembly Line recipes
- Configurable: disable specific Forestry machines you don't need
- Normal and Hard mode recipe sets

### Gendustry Integration
- All materials are converted to GT
- Several new machines will also be added
  - Addition of Industrial Apiary (LV to UV, 8 tiers)
- Full Gendustry modifier support (territory, mutation, lifespan, production, flowering)
- Real-time GUI displaying bee status, queen health, climate info, and breeding progress
- EU-powered — integrates naturally into your GregTech power grid

### GregTech Food Option Integration
- ALL GTFO saplings dynamically registered to Forestry Multifarm
- Recipe conflict fixes with GTFO

### Binnies' Mods Integration
- Full support for the Binnies' Mods ecosystem
  - Genetics — recipe modifications for GregTech compatibility
  - Botany — integrated recipes
  - ExtraBees — recipe overhaul
  - ExtraTrees — recipe overhaul

## Requirements
- GregTech CEu (Required)
- MixinBooter (Required)

## Optional Dependencies
- Forestry — For Forestry integration
- Gendustry — For Industrial Apiary machines
- Binnies' Mods (Genetics, Botany, ExtraBees, ExtraTrees) — For Binnies integration
- GregTech Food Option — For GTFO sapling Multifarm support
